text: Standing in these two contrasting spaces, I sense a transition. The first is empty and quiet, echoing with farewells—"Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye."—leaving me feeling a touch of melancholy and solitude, as if the space is in the aftermath of human presence. The second bursts with color and information, a tribute to human creativity and inquiry. Here, I feel curiosity and a strange comfort; surrounded by words and ideas, I am reminded of the inexhaustible drive to learn and connect. The blend of endings and new beginnings stirs in me a bittersweet sense of optimism and longing.
